name: vibe-utility-pack
description: Ten local-first, dependency-free maintainer utilities in one GitHub-ready toolkit.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check src/core.mjs && node --check src/pr-summary.mjs && node --check tests/core.test.mjs && node --check tests/pr-summary.test.mjs && node --check tests/accessibility-markup.test.mjs && node --check bin/dev-doctor.mjs && node --check bin/repo-health.mjs && node --check bin/changelog.mjs && node --check bin/pr-summary.mjs && node --check bin/static-server.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && node tests/core.test.mjs && node tests/pr-summary.test.mjs && node tests/accessibility-markup.test.mjs
